query: SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(pr.id) as property_count FROM peppr_partners p LEFT JOIN peppr_properties pr ON pr.partner_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY p.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2C19S8bbifd7Eo1.072c8bfadc68 --database jKkhr27mS3Co8cU4bKqLWb --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, COUNT(pr.id) as property_count FROM peppr_partners p LEFT JOIN peppr_properties pr ON pr.partner_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY p.name;
